---
title: "SparseLNR: Accelerating Sparse Tensor Computations Using Loop Nest Restructuring"
date: 2022-06-28
year: 2022
pdf: "https://dl.acm.org/doi/pdf/10.1145/3524059.3532386"
venue: "ICS 2022"
code: "https://github.com/adhithadias/SparseLNR"
slides: "files/slides/ics2022.pptx"
preprint: "https://arxiv.org/pdf/2205.11622.pdf"
video: "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TGGrjp3c2-U"
author:
  - name: Adhitha Dias
  - name: Kirshanthan Sundararajah
  - name: Charitha Saumya
  - name: Milind Kulkarni
categories:
  - Conference
description: ""
---
